description: Single source of truth for all numeric quality gates. Edit here; every skill and agent references this file.

antiAi._comment: Paragraphs scoring below 35/50 trigger revision. 5 dimensions x 10 points each.

selfReview._comment: Articles scoring below 40/60 trigger researcher review before final output. 6 dimensions x 10 points each.

rewriteCycles._comment: Maximum number of times a paragraph can be rewritten before being included with [NEEDS REVIEW].

styleFingerprint._comment: Per-dimension style compliance score. Below 7 triggers paragraph adjustment.
